title: Builtin certificator source-ingest Dockerfile resync (no GitHub pip in image build)
commands: # No mandatory host shell steps: install forge-fleet >= 0.3.53 and restart the service.
# Stale etc/containers/dockerfiles/certificator_source_ingest_worker/Dockerfile is refreshed from the package when deprecated or out of date.
# Optional: POST /v1/container-templates/build with requirement_ids ["certificator_source_ingest_worker"] to rebuild the image without waiting for the next job.

title: Docker Engine with BuildKit buildx (requirement template builds)
commands: #   sudo apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin
# Alternative without buildx: set FLEET_DOCKER_BUILDKIT=0 in forge-fleet.env (see systemd/environment.example)
